description:
A simple hydrant flow test report program capable of printing and saving professional level reports

Igneus Hydrant Flow Test is a simple hydrant flow test report program capable of printing and saving professional level reports you may be proud of. Igneus Hydrant Flow Test calculates flow and pitot pressure in accordance with NFPA 291 "Recommended Practice for Fire Flow Testing and Marking of Hydrants", 2007 edition. Igneus Hydrant Flow Test can even handle multiple flowing outlets.
Once the flow test information is entered, a professional one page report may be previewed, printed, and saved as a pdf file.
